title: Registry Owner Key
description: SSH key linked to an owner via the Web UI. Stored in S3 at auth/owners/{github_id}/owner.json

display_name.description: Owner-set human-readable name for this machine

added_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when key was linked

status.description: Key status — revoked keys cannot publish

publish_permission.description: Whether the owner has granted this key permission to publish
